subcodes.first_line: O Lord, the All-Bountiful, the Ever-Loving! These two unfettered servants and two cherished handmaidens of Thine are even as birds of the meadow, with wings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند بخشاینده مهربانا این دو بنده آزاده و دو کنیز عزیزت مانند مرغان چمن بال
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
